jobs.emptyFilteredHint: Try a different search or level
jobs.heroLead: Search and filter roles that fit you, then apply in a few steps
jobs.about: Be part of a team that cares about great service and growing together. We're looking for motivated people who love serving customers and are eager to learn, to deliver a great experience at every store.
offer: Competitive pay with a performance bonus
steps: Sign in or sign up, then give PDPA consent
Review your details and attach your resume
Submit your application and track its status anytime
jobs.applyNote: Takes only a few minutes · HR will be in touch

privacy.heading: Privacy Notice (PDPA)
privacy.fallbackBody: CP Axtra collects, uses, and discloses applicants personal data for recruitment and selection purposes, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access and obtain a copy of your data, correct it, withdraw consent, and request erasure - all from your account page.
privacy.cookieBody: This site uses only essential cookies for sign-in and language preference. There is no advertising or tracking.
privacy.contactBody: For any personal-data protection questions, please contact the company Data Protection Officer (DPO).
